title: Feedback from Vantage Analytics — Dashboards
text:
Source: In-app NPS survey
Customer: Vantage Analytics (Enterprise)
NPS score: 6
Product area: Dashboards

Comment: The dashboard takes 5 seconds to load when I have more than 10000 widgets. It's unusable for our morning standup.

Requested improvement: Please add 'Webhook retries'.
